creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Hello world :-)

Recent port version 0.21.2_1 of FreeCAD hangs in random moments short time after start east up CPU and needs to be killed making it unusable to work.

There is no particular reason of hang (doing noting, file open, after/during some operation).

I did not see that problem i previous versions.

13.2-RELEASE-p8 GENERIC amd64
